title: Brussels slips nuclear fusion into its upcoming small reactor plan
summary_full: Amid a race to get small, modular nuclear reactors (SMRs) to market, the EU is still placing a bet on the process that powers the sun
summary_public: Amid a race to get small, modular nuclear reactors (SMRs) to market, the EU is still placing a bet on the process that powers the sun

BE.label: positive
BE.evidence: Brussels slips nuclear fusion into its upcoming small reactor plan
